name: prl-poller
description: External SFTP poller for NC Medicaid PRL (Patient Risk List) bidirectional exchange. Runs on Leonard's DigitalOcean droplet under PM2. Pulls inbound files from health plan / NC DHHS SFTP servers and POSTs them to PracticeOS prl-ingest-from-sftp webhook; pushes outbound generated files from cm_prl_exports to plan SFTP servers.
